title: Observation
description:
What the executor hands back after running a [`Plan`]. A single
observation carries one entry per attempted step.

steps.description: Outcome per step, in execution order.

success.description: `true` when every step succeeded and the policy allowed each.

StepResult.description: Outcome of one step in an [`Observation`].

step_id.description: Step id — matches [`Step::id`] in the input plan.

StepStatus.description:
Terminal status for a single step. Mirrors UI affordances (green /
yellow / red / grey).

oneOf.description:
Ran to completion without error (tool call succeeded, or the
step was informational).
Policy rejected the step; plan aborted at this point.
Step was skipped because an earlier step failed or was denied.
